programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash.

programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programs.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can he pull a dysfunctional diner back from the brink of bankruptcy.

programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programs.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. This time: inexperienced owner Steve's jumbled BBQ joint gets a grilling.

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Confident soldier Paul is the opposite of what ex girl band member Natalie goes for. But will she fall for his charm? And can weightlifting octogenarian Dave woo elegant Clare.

programs.title: Taskmaster
programs.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.
